name: Crosswood SA
summary: Crosswood SA holds and manages commercial real estate assets in France. Its property portfolio includes shops and offices, and housing properties. The company was formerly known as Desquenne et Giral. Crosswood SA was incorporated in 1935 and is based in Paris, France. Crosswood SA is a subsidiary of Compagnie Financi√É¬®re de Broc√É¬©liande.
